race.comment: CHRONIC (1) presents third up here having made good improvement last start over this track and trip when bumping into a smart winner. Fitter again here in what looks a winnable race, go close. FENESTELLA (8) resumes for her second campaign having shown some ability in three runs last time in. The placing at Seymour before a spell reads well behind two stakes performed fillies and she can be an improver this time around. HELLACIOUS (11) hasn't placed in seven runs to date but was okay last time at Kilmore and has place claims. KINDAMAGIC (9) resumes with minor claims.
